query:
UPDATE bank_accounts ba
SET balance = (
  SELECT COALESCE(SUM(
    CASE 
      WHEN t.type = 'income' THEN CAST(t.amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))
      WHEN t.type = 'expense' THEN -CAST(t.amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 0)
  FROM transactions t
  WHERE t.accountId = ba.id
);

      WHEN t.type = 'expense' THEN -CAST(t.amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))
